summary: Foundational infrastructure must precede feature work

items.title: Add CommandRunner interface for testable exec
items.rationale: Every component shells out to opencode or gh; tests need mocks
items.risk: All integration tests require real API calls
items.evidence: No exec abstraction exists in internal/

items.title: Implement council spawner with retry and fallback
items.rationale: Core execution engine for running council agents in parallel
items.risk: No council deliberation possible without spawner
dependencies: Add CommandRunner interface for testable exec

items.title: Add input sanitizer for exec arguments
items.rationale: Model outputs are untrusted; argument injection is possible

meta.vision_alignment: Engineering foundation enables all vision goals
